title: pimpinella brachycarpa
intro: Pimpinella brachycarpa, also known as the small chervil or Chinese burnet, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Pimpinella brachycarpa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
